executionHistory.summary: DevOps probe of freshly landed ntfy notification source adapter (commit 1fe8aed5) in round 6 of sweep-2026-05-24-r10. CI auto-coverage via go test ./... verified. Deploy contract (deploy/contract.yaml) requires no new externalImages because ntfy server is operator-external and smackerel-core receives webhooks via existing CORE_HOST_PORT. Compose tailnet-edge bind pattern verified. SST fail-loud wiring of NTFY_SOURCES_JSON via scripts/commands/config.sh::required_json_value verified; empty array is a graceful no-sources state. Docs (Operations.md lines 557-839, API.md) cover the adapter. State-transition-guard PERMITTED with 0 BLOCKs and 2 advisory warnings (test-plan placeholder paths + 53/129 evidence blocks lacking terminal signals — pre-existing baseline). One concrete finding surfaced: parent state.json declared status=done_with_concerns with NO certification.concerns array; child bug BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 state.json had a string-form concerns array instead of the structured-object form required by completion-governance.md.
Bug packet BUG-DEVOPS-20260525-001 opened with severity P3 (low). Acceptance criteria and Gherkin scenarios authored covering parent + child envelopes.

Root-cause attribution: bubbles.validate promoted spec 055 to done_with_concerns at 2026-05-24T22:39:14Z and wrote prose summary into notes field instead of structured concerns array. Existing state-transition-guard.sh checks 1-22 do not assert done_with_concerns ⇒ concerns schema. Fix direction: populate parent certification.concerns from notes-field prose; normalize child concerns from strings to structured objects preserving each summary verbatim; add internal/deploy/state_concerns_contract_test.go to lock down the schema.

Single scope scope-1-state-concerns-schema-compliance defined with DoD covering parent+child concerns population, contract test addition, format/lint, guard cleanliness, change-boundary containment, consumer impact sweep, and shared-infrastructure sweep.

TDD red captured: deterministic test failure showing parent missing concerns array and child entries are flat strings. Implementation applied: parent state.json gained 2 structured concerns (legacy evidence-fence cleanup parent + child literal-done block, both severity:low owner:bubbles.docs action:next-sprint-todo). Child state.json: 7 string entries converted to 7 structured objects with original summaries preserved verbatim; entries 1-6 owner:human action:accept (informational provenance), entry 7 owner:bubbles.docs action:next-sprint-todo (legacy cleanup). New file internal/deploy/state_concerns_contract_test.go added with TestSpec055StateConcernsContract + TestSpec055StateConcernsContractAdversarial (3 adversarial sub-tests prove validator is not tautological).

TDD green captured: focused contract test passes for both parent and child. Full unit regression suite (./... go) passes — internal/deploy package builds and tests in 36.608s with the new contract test included.

Format check passed (51 files already formatted). Lint passed (all checks + web validation). Bug artifact lint clean. Parent artifact lint clean. Bug traceability guard clean. Parent traceability guard clean. Parent state-transition-guard PERMITTED with 0 BLOCKs (advisory warnings unchanged from pre-fix baseline).

Independent rerun of focused unit + full unit suite confirms green. Consumer impact sweep: zero downstream consumers of state.json certification.concerns exist in runtime code (cmd/, internal/ except the new test, ml/, scripts/, web/ all clean). Shared infrastructure sweep: zero changes to shared fixtures, harnesses, bootstrap, auth, session, storage, or framework files. New test uses only standard library imports.

Bug packet (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, uservalidation.md, state.json, report.md) is self-documenting and complete. No external docs/* updates required because the change is artifact-schema-only and exposes no operator-facing surface.

notes: Single-scope artifact-integrity + test-only bug. Closes round-6 devops sweep finding that spec 055 parent state.json declared done_with_concerns without a structured concerns array and child bug BUG-CHAOS-20260524-001 carried string-form concerns instead of the structured-object form. Zero runtime/deploy/security surface touched. New internal/deploy/state_concerns_contract_test.go locks down the schema for both files going forward.
